column1: # Hand-labeled ground truth for web-scraper accuracy (Tier 3). Each row is matched to the
# LARGEST institution whose name contains `name_query` (case-insensitive). Labels are
# hand-verified facts about the real institution
#   gold_business : does it offer business/commercial deposit banking? (yes/no)
#   gold_login    : does it have a distinct BUSINESS online-banking login portal? (yes/no/unknown)
# Use score_coverage.py to score the live snapshot against this set. Expand over time;
# keep labels defensible (mega/regional banks + clearly consumer-only institutions).
